plugins.name: Reddit Answers
plugins.description: When search results include Reddit threads, shows the top comments above results.

plugins.name: OpenStreetMap
plugins.description: Shows an interactive map above search results for location-related queries.

plugins.name: Dictionary
plugins.description: Shows word definitions, pronunciation, synonyms and etymology above search results.

plugins.name: Translate
plugins.description: Translate text using MyMemory API. Usage: !translate <text>. Shows audio, examples and synonyms for single words.

plugins.name: Cool Weather
plugins.description: Shows current weather, 7-day forecast and hourly breakdown with animated icons. Usage: !weather <city>.

plugins.name: Currency
plugins.description: Currency converter with live rates. Supports !currency, or natural queries like '100 usd to eur'.

themes.name: Everforest
themes.description: Warm green forest palette. Dark Hard/Medium/Soft and Light Hard/Medium/Soft.
